arts.ttl: Liverpool confirm 19-man squad for Girona Champions League clash as Arne Slot receives major boost
arts.sum: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson Becker is included in the Reds' 19-man travelling squad for their Champions League clash with Girona on Tuesday evening.

arts.ttl: Alisson Becker returns to Liverpool squad for Girona Champions League clash
arts.sum: Diogo Jota was also involved in training on Monday but was not part of the Reds’ 19-man Champions League squad.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Mac Allister wants TAA to stay
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister is hopeful Liverpool teammate Trent Alexander-Arnold will continue at the club next season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool make Alisson Becker and Diogo Jota decisions as squad named for Girona with seven missing
arts.sum: Liverpool have named just 19 players in the squad that flies out to Girona for the Champions League fixture on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah update hands Liverpool obvious transfer to complete in January
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly offering Mohamed Salah a contract extension after apparently already tabling one to Virgil van Dijk should change their transfer window plans

arts.ttl: Man City 115 charges hearing ends as Liverpool braced for huge update after relegation claim
arts.sum: The hearing into the Premier League's financial charges against Manchester City reportedly ended last week

arts.ttl: Referee David Coote sacked after Klopp comments and second video allegations
arts.sum: He was suspended over foul-mouthed Klopp remarks Video allegedly showed him snorting white powder The Premier League referee David Coote has been sacked after videos revealed him making foul-mouthed comments about Jürgen Klopp and Liverpool and allegedly showed him sniffing what appeared to be white powder. Professional Game Match Officials Ltd said within hours of the first video’s emergence on 11 November that Coote had been suspended pending an investigation and on Monday it said his position had been deemed untenable. Coote was also removed from duty at the time by Uefa and is being separately investigated the Football Association over his comments about Klopp. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool duo Diogo Jota and Alisson Becker in training boost before Girona trip
arts.sum: Jota has not played since sustaining a chest injury against Chelsea on October 20.

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Girona - Champions League
arts.sum: Predicting how Liverpool could line up for their Champions League clash against Girona on Tuesday evening.
